problem_text_cn: 试求解以下三道估算题：1. 电影中轿车车轮“看似未转动”时，估算轿车行进的最低非零速度，并与学生百米短跑平均速度比较；2. 估算教室内全体师生的质量与教室内空气质量之比；3. 均匀带电圆环（半径R、总电量Q>0），已知r≪R，估算圆环平面上与圆心相距r处的电场强度Eᵣ。
problem_text_en: Solve the following three estimation problems: 1. Estimate the minimum non-zero speed of a car when its wheels seem not to rotate in a movie, and compare it with the average speed of students' 100-meter sprint; 2. Estimate the ratio of the mass of all teachers and students in the classroom to the mass of air in the classroom; 3. A uniformly charged ring (radius R, total charge Q>0), given r≪R, estimate the electric field intensity Eᵣ at a point on the ring plane that is r away from the center.
problem_solution_cn: （1）轿车最低行进速度：- 电影拍摄与放映帧率均为24帧/秒，车轮（3辐条）相邻帧转过2π/3时视觉上“未转动”，最小角速度ω=Δθ/Δt=(2π/3)/(1/24)=16π rad/s；- 估算车轮半径R≈0.25m，轿车速度v=ωR=16π×0.25≈13m/s；- 学生百米短跑平均速度约10m/s，故轿车最低速度更快。（2）师生质量与空气质量比：- 估算师生共16人，单人平均体积V₁≈0.05m³，总质量M₁=16×0.05×1000=800kg（人体密度≈1000kg/m³）；- 教室体积V₂≈10m×6m×3m=180m³，空气质量M₂=180×1.2≈216kg（空气密度≈1.2kg/m³）；- 质量比M₁/M₂≈800/216≈3.7（数量级相近）。（3）圆环平面r≪R处电场强度Eᵣ：- 取高斯面（两小圆端面+圆柱侧面），利用对称性和r≪R近似，轴上电场E_z≈Qz/(4πε₀R³)；- 由高斯定理Φ_E=0，端面电通量与侧面电通量抵消，推导得Eᵣ≈Qr/(8πε₀R³)，方向沿径向指向环心。
problem_solution_en: （1）Minimum traveling speed of the car：- Both the shooting and projection frame rates of movies are 24 frames per second. When the car wheel (3 spokes) rotates 2π/3 between adjacent frames, it seems not to rotate visually, with the minimum angular velocity ω=Δθ/Δt=(2π/3)/(1/24)=16π rad/s；- Estimate the wheel radius R≈0.25m, the car speed v=ωR=16π×0.25≈13m/s；- The average speed of students' 100-meter sprint is about 10m/s, so the minimum speed of the car is faster. （2）Ratio of the mass of teachers and students to the mass of air：- Estimate 16 teachers and students in total, the average volume of a single person V₁≈0.05m³, total mass M₁=16×0.05×1000=800kg（human density≈1000kg/m³）；- Classroom volume V₂≈10m×6m×3m=180m³, air mass M₂=180×1.2≈216kg（air density≈1.2kg/m³）；- Mass ratio M₁/M₂≈800/216≈3.7（similar order of magnitude）。（3）Electric field intensity Eᵣ at r≪R on the ring plane：- Take a Gaussian surface (two small circular end faces + cylindrical side face), use symmetry and r≪R approximation, the on-axis electric field E_z≈Qz/(4πε₀R³)；- From Gauss's theorem Φ_E=0, the electric flux through the end faces cancels with that through the side face, deriving Eᵣ≈Qr/(8πε₀R³), direction pointing radially to the ring center。
problem_answer: 1. 轿车最低速度≈13m/s（快于百米短跑平均速度）；2. 质量比≈3.7（数量级相近）；3. 电场强度$E_r≈ rac{Q r}{8\pi \varepsilon_0 R^3}{$}（方向指向环心）
